name: toggle-button
title: ToggleButton
description: Controlled toggle button with pressed state, icon and label support.

consumption.typeImport: import type { ToggleButtonProps, ToggleButtonElevation, ToggleButtonSize } from '@compomo/ui';
consumption.iconImport: import { IconName } from '@ds-mo/icons';  // Tree-shakeable, import only what you need

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by ToggleButton. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
